items.title: Conversation practice
items.body:
Answer aloud first. Then complete the exercises.

Examples:
• What time is it?
• What time? Que horas?
• 4- How many magazines do you have at home?
• 6- Do you prefer milk or juice for breakfast?

items.text: 4- How many magazines do you have at home?

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: Eu me levanto às 7:30 Eu trabalho até às 5:30
options: y thirt five until work I thirty seven at up get I
I get up at seven thirty I work until five thirt y 3.
You get up at seven thirty I work until five thirt y
I get up at seven thirty I work until five thirt y

items.prompt: Choose the English sentence for: O’clock só usa em
Choose the English sentence for: What time is it? Que horas são?

items.answer: 6- Do you prefer milk or juice for breakfast?
